search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: How to Play Tetris 1 Get a Tetris game to play. Tetris is available on almost all electronic mediums, you can try it on your computer; a GBA or Nintendo DS work too.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses playing Tetris, a video game, and provides no information about improving performance in real-world sports or athletic abilities.
